topics.title: Iran war day 116: US eases Iran sanctions; Lebanon ceasefire holds
topics.summary: US eases oil sanctions for 60 days after Iran agrees to allow international nuclear inspections.
topics.reel_text:
Na świecie znowu rośnie napięcie.
Ale najważniejsze pytanie brzmi jedno:
czy za chwilę zapłacisz za to wyższą ceną życia?

Bo największe kryzysy zaczynają się daleko,
a kończą w Twoim portfelu.
topics.post_text:
Iran war day 116: US eases Iran sanctions; Lebanon ceasefire holds

US eases oil sanctions for 60 days after Iran agrees to allow international nuclear inspections.

Tu nie chodzi już tylko o politykę. Jeśli napięcie wokół tego tematu wzrośnie, rynek może przerzucić koszt na paliwo, transport i ceny. I właśnie dlatego to jest temat dla zwykłego człowieka, a nie tylko dla ekspertów.

Myślisz, że to realne zagrożenie dla cen… czy tylko straszenie rynków?
topics.follow_hook: Obserwuj Fabian Talks — bo tu zobaczysz konsekwencje, zanim poczujesz je na rachunku.

topics.title: Why Iran’s President Pezeshkian is heading to Pakistan after US talks
topics.summary: This is Pezeshkian's first overseas trip since Iran war began, and comes a day after the high-stakes Switzerland talks.
topics.reel_text:

topics.post_text:
Why Iran’s President Pezeshkian is heading to Pakistan after US talks

This is Pezeshkian's first overseas trip since Iran war began, and comes a day after the high-stakes Switzerland talks.

topics.title: Iran says technical talks with US in Switzerland conclude successfully
topics.summary: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Ghalibaf also says an agreement reached with the US to release $12bn in frozen assets.

topics.post_text:
Iran says technical talks with US in Switzerland conclude successfully

Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Ghalibaf also says an agreement reached with the US to release $12bn in frozen assets.
